skills.description: Factory skill for creating new pencil-ui-design-system-* skills. Use when you need to add support for a new design system layui antd bootstrap element uview uviewpro vant ucharts echarts etc. to the Pencil ecosystem.
skills.author: new-career-begin

skills.name: pencil-mcp-batch-get
skills.description: Batch search and read node information. The Agent's 'Eyes'. Use to find specific components e.g. all nodes named 'Button' or get child structure within a container.
skills.author: new-career-begin

skills.name: multi-agent-patterns
skills.description: Master orchestrator, peer-to-peer, and hierarchical multi-agent architectures
skills.author: new-career-begin

skills.name: devops-troubleshooter
skills.description: Expert DevOps troubleshooter specializing in rapid incident response, advanced debugging, and modern observability. Masters log analysis, distributed tracing, Kubernetes debugging, performance optimization, and root cause analysis. Handles production outages, system reliability, and preventive monitoring. Use PROACTIVELY for debugging, incident response, or system troubleshooting.
skills.author: new-career-begin

skills.name: relay-doc
skills.description: Save an implementation document (plan, spec, architecture doc) to the Data Relay docs directory. Use this when a conversation produces a document worth preserving for future reference. Always ask March for confirmation before saving.
skills.author: numeric-io

skills.name: relay-doc-list
skills.description: List documents saved in the Data Relay docs and impls directories. Use this to see what design docs, specs, architecture docs, and implementation plans have been preserved from past sessions.
skills.author: numeric-io

skills.name: relay-doc-search
skills.description: Search the Data Relay docs and impls directories for documents relevant to the current work. Use this when a past design doc, spec, architecture doc, or implementation plan might inform the current task.
skills.author: numeric-io

skills.name: relay-presentation
skills.description: Create a new presentation or work on an existing one in the Data Relay. Use this when preparing slide decks for demos — internal team presentations or external audience demos. Propose the presentation to March first; invoke only after approval.
skills.author: numeric-io

skills.name: relay-snippet
skills.description: Save a useful, cool, interesting, or novel code snippet to the Data Relay. Use this when a piece of code encountered or written during a session is worth preserving — elegant patterns, clever solutions, reusable utilities, or instructive examples. When you spot a snippet-worthy moment during work, propose it to March first — if he agrees, invoke this skill to save it.
skills.author: numeric-io

skills.name: relay-record
skills.description: Record a session summary in the Data Relay's daily session log. Creates or appends to today's daily session note with a structured summary of what was worked on. Use this at session end or at natural completion points to capture what happened before context is lost.
skills.author: numeric-io

skills.name: relay-impl
skills.description: Save a generated implementation plan to the Data Relay. Use this when a conversation produces a concrete, code-level plan that bridges a spec to working code — file paths, function signatures, types, wiring, and design decisions. Propose saving to March first; invoke only after approval.
skills.author: numeric-io

skills.name: policy
skills.description: Production-rule policy system for agent decision-making. A structured policy file defines codified rules (precondition → action) that the select phase evaluates deterministically before falling back to the LLM. Inspired by Soar/CoALA (arXiv:2309.02427) production systems and LLM-MAS (arXiv:2412.17481) environmental rules.
skills.author: jnesfield-bot

skills.name: memory
skills.description: Tri-store memory system inspired by human cognitive memory types (episodic, semantic, procedural) and the memory survey (arXiv:2404.13501). Provides structured Write/Manage/Read operations with merging, reflection, and forgetting.
skills.author: jnesfield-bot

skills.name: blackboard
skills.description: Visual observation board for the agent loop. Renders agent state into a segmented layout with lens-based visibility control. Each agent sees only the segments its lens permits. Always read first in the observation step. Inspired by Glyph (arXiv:2510.17800).
skills.author: jnesfield-bot

skills.name: code-search
skills.description: Semantic code search across git repositories. Clone, index, and search functions/classes by natural language query. Multi-stream scoring (name, docstring, body, component matching) inspired by RepoRift (arXiv:2408.11058). Supports multi-repo batch search in a single action.
skills.author: jnesfield-bot

skills.name: replay-buffer
skills.description: Multimodal experience replay buffer. Records every heartbeat transition (board, action, result, attachments) into an indexed store. Supports random sampling, time-range queries, and full episode replay. The RL memory — but for rich multimedia agent state.
skills.author: jnesfield-bot

skills.name: arxiv-research
skills.description: Search arXiv papers, download LaTeX source, extract algorithms and equations, and implement them in code. Use when a task involves academic research, finding papers, understanding algorithms, or implementing methods from publications.
skills.author: jnesfield-bot

skills.name: skill-sequencer
skills.description: Compile a skill into a deterministic step sequence. Takes a SKILL.md and a goal, produces a replayable JSON sequence file that the agent can execute without re-planning. Use when you want to turn a skill into a repeatable, auditable, editable recipe.
skills.author: jnesfield-bot

skills.name: vibe-done
skills.description: Finish a feature with verification. Use when the user thinks a feature is complete.
skills.author: yassineallainwi-netizen

skills.name: vibe-start
skills.description: Start a new feature with a structured spec. Use when the user wants to begin building something new.
skills.author: yassineallainwi-netizen

skills.name: vibe-status
skills.description: Check the current status of the active feature or all features. Use when the user wants a progress report.
skills.author: yassineallainwi-netizen

skills.name: vibe-resume
skills.description: Resume work from a previous session. Use at the start of a new session to restore context.
skills.author: yassineallainwi-netizen
